'''Moloskians''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="Hutt Gambit" /> originating within the [[Moloskia system/Legends|Moloskia system]].<ref name="Planetnamia" /> They had [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] in the backs of their heads.<ref name="Hutt Gambit" />
